title: adisca subfalcata
side_effects: Adisca subfalcata can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, as well as allergic reactions like hives and itching. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to respiratory problems, including shortness of breath and coughing. Improper use of the adisca subfalcata plant can also cause liver and kidney damage, leading to conditions like jaundice and kidney failure. If not used under the guidance of a medical professional, the plant's side effects can be severe and even life-threatening.
